name: CANTOS TET2 CHIP canakinumab substudy
summary: A targeted-sequencing exploratory analysis of the randomized CANTOS trial testing whether TET2 clonal hematopoiesis modified canakinumab cardiovascular outcome response.
population: Post-myocardial-infarction patients with elevated hsCRP and available baseline blood DNA for CHIP sequencing

trial_details.horizon_note: Results are already in the public evidence layer, so this is not an open no-result watch item.
trial_details.why_it_matters: Results matter for Transposon and Somatic Mutation Control because they can show whether the intervention changes health or disease-risk outcomes, biomarkers, and safety in Post-myocardial-infarction patients with elevated hsCRP and available baseline blood DNA for CHIP sequencing. That is still narrower than proof of broad aging reversal.
